import re

def redact(text):
    def mask_email(match):
        email = match.group(0)
        local, domain = email.split('@')
        if len(local) > 1:
            return local[0] + '***@' + domain
        return email
    text = re.sub(r'[\w\.-]+@[\w\.-]+\.\w+', mask_email, text)
    text = re.sub(r'Bearer\s+[\w\.-]+', 'Bearer [REDACTED]', text)
    def mask_sk(match):
        key = match.group(0)
        return key[:3] + '...' + key[-4:]
    text = re.sub(r'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]+', mask_sk, text)
    def mask_card(match):
        card = match.group(0)
        return card[:4] + '********' + card[-4:]
    text = re.sub(r'\b\d{16}\b', mask_card, text)
    return text
